title: story(impl): author cloud/firestore-tenants Terraform module — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Author the `cloud/firestore-tenants` Terraform module that provisions the Firestore database and the `tenants`, `share-grants`, and `share-audit` collections with indexes and IAM bindings.

### Component(s) touched

- [firestore-tenants](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/firestore-tenants.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0001](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0001-tenant-state-storage.md), [ADR-0003](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0003-share-grants.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-01, TR-04

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Module exposes `project_id`, `location`, `tenant_registry_service_account`, `share_service_service_account` inputs and `database_name`, `collections` outputs.
- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive -check` passes.
- [ ] IAM bindings constrain tenant-registry SA to `tenants`, share-service SA to `share-grants` (rw) + `share-audit` (append-only).
- [ ] Indexes provisioned for documented query paths (tenants-by-state, share-grants-by-grantee).

### Prerequisite tasks

- None.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): author cloud/media-bucket Terraform module — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Author the `cloud/media-bucket` Terraform module that provisions the multi-region GCS bucket with versioning, lifecycle rules, and IAM bindings for photo-store and share-service.

### Component(s) touched

- [media-bucket](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/media-bucket.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0002](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0002-media-storage.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-01, TR-02

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Module exposes `project_id`, `location`, `photo_store_service_account`, `share_service_service_account` inputs and `bucket_name` output.
- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive -check` passes.
- [ ] Bucket has versioning + uniform bucket-level access; 90-day version-deletion lifecycle rule.
- [ ] IAM bindings: photo-store SA → object create/get/delete; share-service SA → signed-URL minting.

### Prerequisite tasks

- None.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): add tenant-registry schema and Firestore client — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Introduce the `services/tenant-registry/` skeleton with the `TenantRecord` proto schema and the `service.tenants` Firestore client.

### Component(s) touched

- [tenant-registry](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/tenant-registry.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0001](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0001-tenant-state-storage.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-04, TR-05

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `TenantRecord` protobuf type exists with fields `tenant_id`, `display_name`, `state`, `created_at`, `updated_at`.
- [ ] `service.tenants` client implements CRUD + list against the `tenants` collection.
- [ ] Unit tests cover client round-trip with a Firestore emulator or fake.

### Prerequisite tasks

- firestore-tenants module task (the collection it talks to is provisioned there).

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): wire tenant-registry HTTP endpoints — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Wire the five tenant-registry HTTP endpoints (POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE/LIST) on a chi router with validation and `pkg/errorpb` error responses.

### Component(s) touched

- [tenant-registry](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/tenant-registry.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0001](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0001-tenant-state-storage.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-04, TR-05

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] All five endpoints respond with the canonical record / paged list per the component spec.
- [ ] Validation paths surface `ValidationProblem`; not-found surfaces a 404 problem.
- [ ] Soft-delete sets `state=evicted` rather than removing the document.
- [ ] Unit tests cover each endpoint's happy and error paths.

### Prerequisite tasks

- tenant-registry schema task.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): deploy tenant-registry service (SA + Cloud Run) — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Provision `tenant-registry-sa` and Cloud Run deployment wiring for the tenant-registry service, behind the platform HTTPS load balancer.

### Component(s) touched

- [tenant-registry](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/tenant-registry.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0001](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0001-tenant-state-storage.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-04

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `tenant-registry-sa` exists with read/write only on the `tenants` collection.
- [ ] Cloud Run service deploys cleanly with `HTTP_PORT=8080` health check.
- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive -check` passes.

### Prerequisite tasks

- firestore-tenants module task; tenant-registry endpoints task.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): add photo-store skeleton and GCS client — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Introduce the `services/photo-store/` skeleton with the object-handle proto and the GCS client enforcing per-tenant prefix isolation (`{tenant_id}/{ulid}.{ext}`).

### Component(s) touched

- [photo-store](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/photo-store.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0002](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0002-media-storage.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-01, TR-02

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] GCS client refuses reads/writes outside the caller's tenant prefix.
- [ ] Object-handle protobuf type exists.
- [ ] Unit tests cover prefix-enforcement edge cases.

### Prerequisite tasks

- media-bucket module task.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): wire photo-store HTTP endpoints — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Wire the four photo-store HTTP endpoints (upload/get/delete/list) with tenant-id validation against tenant-registry.

### Component(s) touched

- [photo-store](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/photo-store.md)

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0002](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0002-media-storage.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-01, TR-02

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Upload/get/delete/list endpoints behave per the component spec.
- [ ] Tenant-id is validated against tenant-registry; unknown tenant returns a problem response.
- [ ] Unit tests cover happy + error paths.

### Prerequisite tasks

- photo-store skeleton task; tenant-registry endpoints task (for tenant-id validation).

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): add share-service schema and Firestore clients — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Introduce the `services/share-service/` skeleton with `ShareGrant` + `ShareAuditEvent` protos and Firestore clients for `share-grants` (rw) and `share-audit` (append-only).

### Component(s) touched

- [share-service](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/share-service.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0003](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0003-share-grants.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-03, TR-06, TR-07

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `ShareGrant` and `ShareAuditEvent` protobuf types exist with documented fields.
- [ ] Audit-log writer is append-only (no update/delete code paths).
- [ ] Unit tests cover client round-trip with a Firestore emulator or fake.

### Prerequisite tasks

- firestore-tenants module task.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): wire share-service HTTP endpoints and signed-URL minting — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Wire the five share-service HTTP endpoints (mint/get/revoke/url/list) with audit-event emission and signed-URL minting against the media bucket.

### Component(s) touched

- [share-service](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/share-service.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0003](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0003-share-grants.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-03, TR-06, TR-07

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] All five endpoints behave per the component spec; revoke + url emit the documented audit events.
- [ ] Signed URLs are short-lived and respect grant expiry/state.
- [ ] Unit tests cover happy + error + revoked-grant paths.

### Prerequisite tasks

- share-service schema task; media-bucket module task.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): deploy share-service (SA + Cloud Run) — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Provision `share-service-sa` with signed-URL minting + share-collection IAM, and Cloud Run deployment wiring for the share-service.

### Component(s) touched

- [share-service](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/share-service.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0003](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0003-share-grants.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-03

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `share-service-sa` has rw on `share-grants`, append-only on `share-audit`, and signed-URL minting on the bucket.
- [ ] Cloud Run service deploys cleanly with `HTTP_PORT=8080` health check.
- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive -check` passes.

### Prerequisite tasks

- firestore-tenants module task; media-bucket module task; share-service endpoints task.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)
